records.m_SubTitle_ENG: 10 hours since the Black Flood onset
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: 10 hours since the Black Flood onset
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: 10 hours since the Black Flood onset

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we're short on transports to evacuate the islanders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we're short on transports to evacuate the islanders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we're short on transports to evacuate the islanders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say they'll stand their ground, but... it's still far too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say they'll stand their ground, but... it's still far too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say they'll stand their ground, but... it's still far too dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We should at least have transports ready, just in case.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We should at least have transports ready, just in case.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We should at least have transports ready, just in case.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the maids serving the Supreme Administrator and the mercenaries here, we can't let our guard down yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the maids serving the Supreme Administrator and the mercenaries here, we can't let our guard down yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the maids serving the Supreme Administrator and the mercenaries here, we can't let our guard down yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This island was supposed to be unaffected by the Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This island was supposed to be unaffected by the Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This island was supposed to be unaffected by the Black Flood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The last time a Corruption disaster of this scale hit this island was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The last time a Corruption disaster of this scale hit this island was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The last time a Corruption disaster of this scale hit this island was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years ago during the Administration Failure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years ago during the Administration Failure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years ago during the Administration Failure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember saving a little girl back then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember saving a little girl back then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember saving a little girl back then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's a mother now, apparently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's a mother now, apparently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's a mother now, apparently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time really flies, doesn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time really flies, doesn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time really flies, doesn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see... Has it already been that long?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see... Has it already been that long?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see... Has it already been that long?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If what the Alphatrix President said is true, then you and Kiera are now
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If what the Alphatrix President said is true, then you and Kiera are now
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If what the Alphatrix President said is true, then you and Kiera are now
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-the signal...? Why is it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-the signal...? Why is it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-the signal...? Why is it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Bellamy! Do you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Bellamy! Do you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Bellamy! Do you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This quake...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This quake...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This quake...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior! CSE levels around the Grand Dimension Crevice are rising rapidly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior! CSE levels around the Grand Dimension Crevice are rising rapidly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior! CSE levels around the Grand Dimension Crevice are rising rapidly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Readings show CSE Level 4!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Readings show CSE Level 4!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Readings show CSE Level 4!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Withdraw all combat troops from every sector!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Withdraw all combat troops from every sector!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Withdraw all combat troops from every sector!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seal the bulwark! We'll hold the Black Flood from inside the sectors!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seal the bulwark! We'll hold the Black Flood from inside the sectors!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seal the bulwark! We'll hold the Black Flood from inside the sectors!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior! The bulwark can no longer hold back the Black Flood!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior! The bulwark can no longer hold back the Black Flood!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior! The bulwark can no longer hold back the Black Flood!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-if that happens...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-if that happens...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-if that happens...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it were just Kraken, we wouldn't be sealing the bulwark at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it were just Kraken, we wouldn't be sealing the bulwark at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it were just Kraken, we wouldn't be sealing the bulwark at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this isn't just that. We're staring down the omen... the Demon Lord's advance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this isn't just that. We're staring down the omen... the Demon Lord's advance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this isn't just that. We're staring down the omen... the Demon Lord's advance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And until we activate the Track Switcher to delay it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And until we activate the Track Switcher to delay it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And until we activate the Track Switcher to delay it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, Senior...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, Senior...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, Senior...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please get out of there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please get out of there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please get out of there!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's going to
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's going to
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's going to
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Awareness distortion... filters? A ship?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Awareness distortion... filters? A ship?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Awareness distortion... filters? A ship?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you're talking about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So by your words, this isn't the work of aliens or a spaceship?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So by your words, this isn't the work of aliens or a spaceship?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So by your words, this isn't the work of aliens or a spaceship?

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-of course not!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-of course not!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course not!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though I wouldn't mind meeting aliens if they existed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though I wouldn't mind meeting aliens if they existed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though I wouldn't mind meeting aliens if they existed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain. We're not here to exchange business cards.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain. We're not here to exchange business cards.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain. We're not here to exchange business cards.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moneka. We came risking our lives to end the Black Flood ravaging our home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moneka. We came risking our lives to end the Black Flood ravaging our home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moneka. We came risking our lives to end the Black Flood ravaging our home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't something your crew would want to hear, but we need a way to defeat the Black Flood... to defeat Kraken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't something your crew would want to hear, but we need a way to defeat the Black Flood... to defeat Kraken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't something your crew would want to hear, but we need a way to defeat the Black Flood... to defeat Kraken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't let... all these sacrifices be for nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't let... all these sacrifices be for nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't let... all these sacrifices be for nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To keep all those sacrifices from going to waste...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To keep all those sacrifices from going to waste...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To keep all those sacrifices from going to waste...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to hold this city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to hold this city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to hold this city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You look utterly exhausted, Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You look utterly exhausted, Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You look utterly exhausted, Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watching idly was driving me mad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watching idly was driving me mad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watching idly was driving me mad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have your injuries from Kraken ten years ago healed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have your injuries from Kraken ten years ago healed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have your injuries from Kraken ten years ago healed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you'd find a successor and yet here you are, acting every bit the noble lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you'd find a successor and yet here you are, acting every bit the noble lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you'd find a successor and yet here you are, acting every bit the noble lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for the compliment, Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for the compliment, Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for the compliment, Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deep wounds don't heal so easily, it seems.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deep wounds don't heal so easily, it seems.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deep wounds don't heal so easily, it seems.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it weren't for the Fenrir Commander... we all would've died ten years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it weren't for the Fenrir Commander... we all would've died ten years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it weren't for the Fenrir Commander... we all would've died ten years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't forgotten how you fought Kraken alone until Coffin Company arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't forgotten how you fought Kraken alone until Coffin Company arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't forgotten how you fought Kraken alone until Coffin Company arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have my thanks, again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have my thanks, again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have my thanks, again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, are we really exchanging such sappy lines?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, are we really exchanging such sappy lines?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, are we really exchanging such sappy lines?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu... seems you've become a proper Senior of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu... seems you've become a proper Senior of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu... seems you've become a proper Senior of the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the case, you did sacrifice yourself for us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the case, you did sacrifice yourself for us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the case, you did sacrifice yourself for us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you been bored all this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you been bored all this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you been bored all this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, even in my dull daily life, Front Bay always found ways to entertain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, even in my dull daily life, Front Bay always found ways to entertain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, even in my dull daily life, Front Bay always found ways to entertain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Shipboard Rebellion, the Black Flood, pirate-hunter alliances...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Shipboard Rebellion, the Black Flood, pirate-hunter alliances...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Shipboard Rebellion, the Black Flood, pirate-hunter alliances...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those moments when flesh tears, bones jut out, and people scream in agony...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those moments when flesh tears, bones jut out, and people scream in agony...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those moments when flesh tears, bones jut out, and people scream in agony...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect diversions for someone forced to sit still and watch from afar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect diversions for someone forced to sit still and watch from afar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect diversions for someone forced to sit still and watch from afar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Still sharp-tongued, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Still sharp-tongued, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Still sharp-tongued, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu. Think of it as a little thrill in a boring life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu. Think of it as a little thrill in a boring life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. Think of it as a little thrill in a boring life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, it's not like I caused much trouble, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, it's not like I caused much trouble, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, it's not like I caused much trouble, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you weren't the crew commander, you'd be rotting in the Deepsea Gaol right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you weren't the crew commander, you'd be rotting in the Deepsea Gaol right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you weren't the crew commander, you'd be rotting in the Deepsea Gaol right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu. Joking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu. Joking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. Joking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what brings you here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what brings you here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what brings you here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is the kid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is the kid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is the kid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The kid...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The kid...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The kid...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ringleader of the 56th Front Bay Shipboard Rebellion, Kiera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ringleader of the 56th Front Bay Shipboard Rebellion, Kiera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ringleader of the 56th Front Bay Shipboard Rebellion, Kiera.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I sent her with Bellamy to the island that issued the emergency request.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I sent her with Bellamy to the island that issued the emergency request.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I sent her with Bellamy to the island that issued the emergency request.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the moment we were receiving the status report, contact was cut.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the moment we were receiving the status report, contact was cut.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the moment we were receiving the status report, contact was cut.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And right after that, the CSE level hit 4.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And right after that, the CSE level hit 4.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And right after that, the CSE level hit 4.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Must be the sea's Corruption rays intensifying that's scrambling communication signals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Must be the sea's Corruption rays intensifying that's scrambling communication signals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Must be the sea's Corruption rays intensifying that's scrambling communication signals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Front Bay will be getting hit by stronger waves as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Front Bay will be getting hit by stronger waves as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Front Bay will be getting hit by stronger waves as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why not just leave them be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why not just leave them be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why not just leave them be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're in a situation where anything we touch could explode.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're in a situation where anything we touch could explode.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're in a situation where anything we touch could explode.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heading out to check on that girl now would be a reckless gamble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heading out to check on that girl now would be a reckless gamble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heading out to check on that girl now would be a reckless gamble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Intent aside, we've abandoned someone once before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Intent aside, we've abandoned someone once before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Intent aside, we've abandoned someone once before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bonny.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bonny.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can tell what you're remembering even with that ridiculous helmet on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can tell what you're remembering even with that ridiculous helmet on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can tell what you're remembering even with that ridiculous helmet on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, my joke went too far. I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, my joke went too far. I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, my joke went too far. I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then shall we get ready to depart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then shall we get ready to depart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then shall we get ready to depart?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What? You
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What? You
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What? You
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old and frail as I am, I'm still your deck officer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old and frail as I am, I'm still your deck officer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old and frail as I am, I'm still your deck officer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though... <color=#ffd34c>Treasure Hunter Jack</color> seems to have hired a different one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though... <color=#ffd34c>Treasure Hunter Jack</color> seems to have hired a different one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though... <color=#ffd34c>Treasure Hunter Jack</color> seems to have hired a different one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-Ahem... Well, I couldn't exactly hire someone who retired from piracy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-Ahem... Well, I couldn't exactly hire someone who retired from piracy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-Ahem... Well, I couldn't exactly hire someone who retired from piracy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough with the excuses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough with the excuses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough with the excuses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time is short. Let's move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time is short. Let's move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time is short. Let's move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As luck would have it, I've just secured passage on a ship bound for that island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As luck would have it, I've just secured passage on a ship bound for that island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As luck would have it, I've just secured passage on a ship bound for that island.

root.m_SubTitle_DEU: 10 hours since the Black Flood onset
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: 10 hours since the Black Flood onset

root.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, Senior...!

root.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, Senior...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please get out of there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please get out of there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please get out of there!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
It's going to
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
It's going to
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
It's going to
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Awareness distortion... filters? A ship?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Awareness distortion... filters? A ship?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Awareness distortion... filters? A ship?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you're talking about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you're talking about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you're talking about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So by your words, this isn't the work of aliens or a spaceship?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So by your words, this isn't the work of aliens or a spaceship?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So by your words, this isn't the work of aliens or a spaceship?

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-of course not!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-of course not!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course not!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though I wouldn't mind meeting aliens if they existed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though I wouldn't mind meeting aliens if they existed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though I wouldn't mind meeting aliens if they existed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain. We're not here to exchange business cards.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain. We're not here to exchange business cards.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain. We're not here to exchange business cards.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Moneka. We came risking our lives to end the Black Flood ravaging our home.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Moneka. We came risking our lives to end the Black Flood ravaging our home.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Moneka. We came risking our lives to end the Black Flood ravaging our home.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't something your crew would want to hear, but we need a way to defeat the Black Flood... to defeat Kraken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't something your crew would want to hear, but we need a way to defeat the Black Flood... to defeat Kraken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't something your crew would want to hear, but we need a way to defeat the Black Flood... to defeat Kraken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can't let... all these sacrifices be for nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can't let... all these sacrifices be for nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can't let... all these sacrifices be for nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To keep all those sacrifices from going to waste...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To keep all those sacrifices from going to waste...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To keep all those sacrifices from going to waste...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have to hold this city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have to hold this city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have to hold this city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You look utterly exhausted, Captain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You look utterly exhausted, Captain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You look utterly exhausted, Captain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Watching idly was driving me mad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Watching idly was driving me mad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Watching idly was driving me mad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have your injuries from Kraken ten years ago healed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have your injuries from Kraken ten years ago healed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have your injuries from Kraken ten years ago healed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said you'd find a successor and yet here you are, acting every bit the noble lady.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said you'd find a successor and yet here you are, acting every bit the noble lady.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said you'd find a successor and yet here you are, acting every bit the noble lady.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for the compliment, Captain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for the compliment, Captain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for the compliment, Captain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deep wounds don't heal so easily, it seems.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deep wounds don't heal so easily, it seems.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deep wounds don't heal so easily, it seems.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it weren't for the Fenrir Commander... we all would've died ten years ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it weren't for the Fenrir Commander... we all would've died ten years ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it weren't for the Fenrir Commander... we all would've died ten years ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't forgotten how you fought Kraken alone until Coffin Company arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't forgotten how you fought Kraken alone until Coffin Company arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't forgotten how you fought Kraken alone until Coffin Company arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have my thanks, again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have my thanks, again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have my thanks, again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, are we really exchanging such sappy lines?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, are we really exchanging such sappy lines?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, are we really exchanging such sappy lines?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu... seems you've become a proper Senior of the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu... seems you've become a proper Senior of the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu... seems you've become a proper Senior of the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the case, you did sacrifice yourself for us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the case, you did sacrifice yourself for us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the case, you did sacrifice yourself for us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you been bored all this time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you been bored all this time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you been bored all this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, even in my dull daily life, Front Bay always found ways to entertain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, even in my dull daily life, Front Bay always found ways to entertain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, even in my dull daily life, Front Bay always found ways to entertain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Shipboard Rebellion, the Black Flood, pirate-hunter alliances...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Shipboard Rebellion, the Black Flood, pirate-hunter alliances...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Shipboard Rebellion, the Black Flood, pirate-hunter alliances...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those moments when flesh tears, bones jut out, and people scream in agony...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those moments when flesh tears, bones jut out, and people scream in agony...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those moments when flesh tears, bones jut out, and people scream in agony...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect diversions for someone forced to sit still and watch from afar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect diversions for someone forced to sit still and watch from afar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect diversions for someone forced to sit still and watch from afar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Still sharp-tongued, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Still sharp-tongued, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Still sharp-tongued, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu. Think of it as a little thrill in a boring life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu. Think of it as a little thrill in a boring life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. Think of it as a little thrill in a boring life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, it's not like I caused much trouble, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, it's not like I caused much trouble, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, it's not like I caused much trouble, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you weren't the crew commander, you'd be rotting in the Deepsea Gaol right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you weren't the crew commander, you'd be rotting in the Deepsea Gaol right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you weren't the crew commander, you'd be rotting in the Deepsea Gaol right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu. Joking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu. Joking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu. Joking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what brings you here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what brings you here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what brings you here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where is the kid?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where is the kid?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where is the kid?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The kid...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The kid...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The kid...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ringleader of the 56th Front Bay Shipboard Rebellion, Kiera.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ringleader of the 56th Front Bay Shipboard Rebellion, Kiera.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ringleader of the 56th Front Bay Shipboard Rebellion, Kiera.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I sent her with Bellamy to the island that issued the emergency request.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I sent her with Bellamy to the island that issued the emergency request.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I sent her with Bellamy to the island that issued the emergency request.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the moment we were receiving the status report, contact was cut.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the moment we were receiving the status report, contact was cut.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the moment we were receiving the status report, contact was cut.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And right after that, the CSE level hit 4.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And right after that, the CSE level hit 4.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And right after that, the CSE level hit 4.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Must be the sea's Corruption rays intensifying that's scrambling communication signals.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Must be the sea's Corruption rays intensifying that's scrambling communication signals.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Must be the sea's Corruption rays intensifying that's scrambling communication signals.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Front Bay will be getting hit by stronger waves as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Front Bay will be getting hit by stronger waves as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Front Bay will be getting hit by stronger waves as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why not just leave them be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then why not just leave them be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then why not just leave them be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're in a situation where anything we touch could explode.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're in a situation where anything we touch could explode.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're in a situation where anything we touch could explode.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heading out to check on that girl now would be a reckless gamble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heading out to check on that girl now would be a reckless gamble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heading out to check on that girl now would be a reckless gamble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Intent aside, we've abandoned someone once before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Intent aside, we've abandoned someone once before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Intent aside, we've abandoned someone once before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bonny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bonny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can tell what you're remembering even with that ridiculous helmet on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can tell what you're remembering even with that ridiculous helmet on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can tell what you're remembering even with that ridiculous helmet on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, my joke went too far. I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, my joke went too far. I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, my joke went too far. I'm sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then shall we get ready to depart?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then shall we get ready to depart?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then shall we get ready to depart?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What? You
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What? You
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What? You
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Old and frail as I am, I'm still your deck officer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Old and frail as I am, I'm still your deck officer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Old and frail as I am, I'm still your deck officer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though... <color=#ffd34c>Treasure Hunter Jack</color> seems to have hired a different one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though... <color=#ffd34c>Treasure Hunter Jack</color> seems to have hired a different one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though... <color=#ffd34c>Treasure Hunter Jack</color> seems to have hired a different one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-Ahem... Well, I couldn't exactly hire someone who retired from piracy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-Ahem... Well, I couldn't exactly hire someone who retired from piracy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-Ahem... Well, I couldn't exactly hire someone who retired from piracy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Enough with the excuses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Enough with the excuses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Enough with the excuses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Time is short. Let's move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Time is short. Let's move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Time is short. Let's move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As luck would have it, I've just secured passage on a ship bound for that island.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As luck would have it, I've just secured passage on a ship bound for that island.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As luck would have it, I've just secured passage on a ship bound for that island.
